channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260415)
item.description:
What's New

fix: improve window rules detection timing and add diagnostic logging

Bug fixes:

  • Move handleSmartSwitch() inside 50ms AX delay block to fix rule evaluation

timing. Previously, getTargetInputSourceOverride() evaluated window title

rules immediately on app switch, before AX tree had updated, causing

rules to fail matching when window title was not yet available.

Diagnostic logging (for debugging rule match failures):

  • [RuleMatch] windowTitle is EMPTY — fires when title unavailable at detection
  • [RuleMatch] Matched: [ruleName] — fires when matched rules change
  • [RuleMatch] Rules cleared → no match — fires when rules stop matching
  • Window title logged in app switch and AX focus change handlers

Performance optimizations:

  • Guard debugLogCallback with if-let to avoid string creation when inactive
  • Track _lastLoggedRuleMatchKey to only log when matched rules change
  • Reuse FocusedElementInfo lazy cache for window title logging

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
